string 2:
So Blimpmon is back? Yay! Now we can go anywhere we want
again!

Sorry to worry ya. I'm fixed up good as new, so I'm fit to
fly anywhere!
Blimpmon is so cool. But it won't beat me!
{next}You can do it!
{next}Beat you at what?
{next}Can you even fly?

Well, yeah, of course I can! I'm going to do big things.
Just you watch!

I'll win by showing I can work even harder than Blimpmon!
You know, by, um...

That's not what I mean! I'm talking more like, um, you
know...

Now I can go to the Cosmic Area! Training in a legendary
spot'll get me in awesome shape!
{next}Get you in awesome shape?
{next}The Cosmic Area?
{next}Be happy with who you are now.

Yeah! Me falling behind you guys was all just some kind of
mistake!

A fabled place at the world's end, full of harsh
environments and battle-scarred vets!

I-I am happy with who I am now! It's everyone else who can't
see how great I am!

So I'm gonna train in the Cosmic Area and become a big shot
in both rep and reality!

Those Titans'll think twice about messing with our town!
Even if you aren't around!
Coronamon...
Hate to butt in while you're gettin' so fired up, but...
What is it? You getting excited, too, Blimpmon?
...I can't go to the Cosmic Area, kid.
...Huh?

Apparently, it's got a crazy climate with scorchin' heat AND
bitter cold!

And I only just got fixed up, so I'm not kitted out for a
trip to the ends of Iliad.

If I overdo it and end up grounded again, it'll only be more
trouble for everybody.
B-But...
Phew, thank goodness...
What was that you said?
N-No, nothing at all!
But you get it now, right? You can't go to the Cosmic Area!
If you want to train, do it here in town!

D-Dang it. This isn't fair... The legendary Cosmic Area is
the only place that—
Now, let's go! We all have our roles to play and jobs to do!
O-Okay, f-fine. I've got it...!

Man... Those kids sure got a lotta energy. Maybe there's
hope for this town, after all!
{next}Is there any way to reach the Cosmic Area?
{next}I wanna help realize our friend's wish.
{next}Too much energy.

What? Now you wanna go there, too? I wouldn't recommend it,
but... Hmm...
I hear ya. I feel the same way, too...

Hehehe. Ya aren't wrong! Anybody who'd wanna visit the
Cosmic Area has energy to burn.

I'm pretty sure there's a way to get there, but I still
don't have the necessary gear.

For Heat Cosmic, I need a cooler, and for Chill Cosmic, I
need a heater.
{next}Let's go find some.
Heat Cosmic?
Chill Cosmic?

What? Seriously? Wow... Ya really mean it about helping
those kids, huh!

Now that it's back up and running, the Factorial Area might
have a cooler.

I go to the Factorial Area for work sometimes, but never to
the village...

It's so hot there, I feel like I'm gonna melt. Without a
cooler, I'd break down.

It'll freeze a pineapple solid enough to use as a hammer!
I'd be a fool to go in there without a heater.
{next}I'll go take a look.
Is there a cooler in the village?
The village is a no-go?
Wha... Really?! That'd be way too cool of ya!

If ya do find a cooler, bring it my way! I'll get the
engineer Datamon to install it!

This is all hearsay, but word is that they use coolers
there.

I'd be in the way if I went to the village, anyway. I can
only land in wide-open spaces.
Aw, man... If only I could get to the Cosmic Area.

Then I could train super hard and get super strong. *sigh* I
just can't let it go...
Honest opinion? I'm relieved Blimpmon said no.

You're thinking way too recklessly. That place is as
dangerous as it gets!

...Insulation material? I'm afraid the Titans made off with
every last bit of it.

They're probably still in the area. They may drop some if
you give them a good walloping.

The tool shop developed the cooler. It's useful for
controlling blast furnace heat.

You can buy one at the tool shop, but the owner tends to
change the price on a whim.
Hey! Look who it is! Where are we off to today?
{next}I brought you a cooler.
Where can I find a cooler again?
{end}I'll be back later.
Wow, you're amazing! You actually found some.
I'll ask Datamon to install it right away.
They say the village in the Factorial Area has coolers.

It's just hearsay, so you'll have to go there and ask to
find out exactly where, though.
I've got a cooler at last! Hot places are no longer a worry.

I'm sure we can reach Heat Cosmic, too, as long as we steer
clear of any cold zones.

Can you go and let Coronamon know? Tell that kid I'm ready
to fly anytime!
What's up? ...Wait. Blimpmon had a cooler installed?!

Now I can go to the Cosmic Area! I'll get Blimpmon to take
me there right away!
H-Hold on, now. You really intend to go there?
Naturally! It'll be fine. Now, let's go see Blimpmon!

Blimpmon! Is it true you can go to the Cosmic Area now? You
don't look any different...

Don't you worry. I may not look it, but I'm ready to beat
the heat. So, shall we be off?
Yeah!

*sigh* So we're really, really going, huh? I sure hope this
works out.
No, it's only me going.
What?
You can wait here. It's only me that needs to train, right?

After all, only one can be the strongest! And then I'll
protect everyone!
But...!
Just relax and wait here. I'll be back once I've Digivolved!
Sorry for the wait, Blimpmon. Let's get moving!
Hey, wait! I wasn't finished talking to yo—
Oh, no... They're gone. Will Coronamon be okay...?
{next}I'm sure he will.
{next}Should we go, too?
{next}I forgot to ask for a reward!
I really hope so... But where does this leave me...?
That's not really possible. Blimpmon's gone.
Oh, I think I can help you with that.

I got this for Coronamon when he said he wanted to travel,
but I'm giving it to you.
*sigh* So what now? I need to come up with a game plan, too.

Coronamon makes me so mad! I'm gonna sic Minnie on him as
soon as he gets back!
But, anyway, thanks for everything. You were a big help.
Gegege. Hi, there.
If it's a cooler ya want, today's your lucky day.

Right here, right now, I'll offer ya some at the massive
discount price of 10,000,000 YEN.
{next}I'll take it.
That's way too much!
{end}Let me think about it.
All right, fine. 10,000 YEN, then, as a special offer.

But only for you, my friend... Don't go tellin' anybody
else! Gegege...
{next}I'll take it.
That's still too much!
{end}Let me think about it.

Hey, I gotta make a livin', too, ya know. How about 5,000
YEN? That's like givin' it away.
{next}I'll take it.
Just a little lower!
{end}Let me think about it.

You're a real piece of work, aren't ya...? Fine. 1,000 YEN,
and then get outta my face!
Lower, please!
{next}I'll take it.
{end}Let me think about it.

Don't play with me, kid... I ain't runnin' a daycare,
here...

I got nothin' to sell to a crackpot like you. But if ya
insist, the price is 10,000 YEN.
{next}Please let me buy some.
{end}I'll just be leaving, then.
Geh heh. 'Ppreciate the business.
Short on funds...? Then, leave. No window-shoppers allowed.
Hmph. Come back the day before yesterday.
Thanks... Now get outta here, ya swindler...
By all means, think it over. Gegege.
Hi, there. What'll it be today?
{next}I wanna buy a cooler.
Show me what you've got.
{end}Nothing right now.
The cooler costs 10,000 YEN. Well...?

It's a very popular item. Always sells out right away.
Gegege.
The cooler costs 5,000 YEN. Well...?
The cooler costs 1,000 YEN.

You're really, really pushing me to the limit here, pal... I
got kids at home to feed...
Shoulda said so from the get-go. Fine, I'll sell ya some.
